title: aneilema angolense var. luteum
intro: Aneilema angolense var. luteum, also known as yellow aneilema, is a plant species belonging to the family Commelinaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in treating various health conditions such as skin infections and wounds. The health benefits of Aneilema angolense var. luteum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent the growth of certain microorganisms. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine.
